headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 23, 2026**
article:
The St. Louis Cardinals suffered a 4-1 loss to the Miami Marlins, led by Iván Herrera's home run and RBI. In other action, the Houston Astros secured a shutout victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Peter Lambert pitching 6.0 innings and allowing 0 earned runs. Yordan Alvarez led the Astros' offense with a 3-hit, 2-RBI performance, including his 11th home run of the season.

Several players have been impacted by injuries, including Dylan Dodd, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list by the Atlanta Braves due to left thoracic spine inflammation. Other players on the injured list include Bryan Hoeing (San Diego Padres), Wyatt Langford (Texas Rangers), Max Lazar (Philadelphia Phillies), J.T. Realmuto (Philadelphia Phillies), Bailey Horn (Detroit Tigers), Triston Casas (Boston Red Sox), and Bryan Hoeing (San Diego Padres).

The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake in a trade with the New York Yankees. Other trades include the Los Angeles Dodgers trading RHP Chayce McDermott to the Baltimore Orioles, the New York Mets trading LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash, and the Arizona Diamondbacks trading RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Fall to Marlins in 4-1 Loss**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals dropped a 4-1 decision to the Miami Marlins in their latest matchup. Iván Herrera led the Cardinals' offense with a home run and an RBI.

top_news.title: **Astros Shut Out Guardians 2-0**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a shutout victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Peter Lambert pitching 6.0 innings and allowing 0 earned runs. Yordan Alvarez led the Astros' offense with a 3-hit, 2-RBI performance, including his 11th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Reds Fall to Rays in Dominant 6-1 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays took control of the game early, ultimately securing a 6-1 victory over the Cincinnati Reds. Junior Caminero led the Reds' offense with a home run and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Royals 8-6**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured an 8-6 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Coby Mayo leading the offense with a home run and three RBIs. Anthony Nunez earned the save in relief, following a strong outing from Chris Bassitt.

top_news.title: **Braves Place Dodd on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Atlanta Braves left-handed pitcher Dylan Dodd has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left thoracic spine inflammation, effective retroactive to April 22, 2026.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake in a trade. Shewmake joins the Astros after being dealt from the New York Yankees.
